---
title: "LING 343 GitHub"
author: "Zane Mohammad"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
output: 
  html_document:
    css: LING 343/Dark Data.css
---

<link href="Dark Data.css" rel="stylesheet"></link>

<<<<<<< HEAD
## [LING343 Project 1](/Project%201/Project%201.html)

## [LING343 Project 2](/Lit-Sentiment.html)
=======
## [Project 2](/project 2.html)
>>>>>>> parent of 20ab2b0 (Added Project 1)

```{r}
```
